name: Sources of Truth
summary: Two SoTs exist: Hot (workspace) for discovery and Cold (canon) for curated truth. Work in Hot, merge to Cold after Gatekeeper passes. Views export from Cold snapshots only.

content.text:
## Sources of Truth

### Hot SoT (Workspace)

**Purpose**: Discovery space for drafts, hooks, work-in-progress

**Characteristics**:
- Mutable (all agents can read/write)
- Spoilers allowed
- Canon work-in-progress lives here
- Plan-only assets (art/audio) staged here

### Cold SoT (Canon)

**Purpose**: Curated canon and player-safe surfaces

**Characteristics**:
- Cold semantics (exclusive production by Lore Weaver)
- No spoilers on player-facing content
- Merge to Cold only after Gatekeeper passes all quality bars
- Ship-ready, not staging

### Snapshots and Views

**Snapshot**: Immutable tag of Cold (e.g., `cold@2025-10-28`)
- Exports are cut from snapshots
- Views cite their source snapshot

**View**: Player-safe export bundle (MD/HTML/EPUB/PDF)
- Built from a snapshot via Binding Run
- Never ships from Hot

### The Merge Train

1. Work in Hot
2. Gatecheck (8 quality bars)
3. Merge to Cold (on pass)
4. Snapshot
5. Build View

### Golden Rule

**Never ship from Hot. Never bypass Gatekeeper.**
